overall.description: A cinematic game engine sequence from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a rainy night on a neon-lit elevated walkway in Night City, transitioning to a serene waterfront sunrise. A character observes the city before walking past the camera, followed by a peaceful dawn scene over calm waters.

scene fades to black transitioning from city to waterfront

segments.scene_description: A static shot from an elevated walkway in a cyberpunk city during a rainy night. A character stands by a glass railing overlooking the neon-lit skyline, then turns and walks toward and past the camera. The wet pavement reflects the cyan and orange neon lights of surrounding skyscrapers while atmospheric haze and rain create a moody ambiance.

scene_state.functional_zone: calm waterfront at sunrise with distant industrial skyline

events.description: fade from black reveals waterfront scene with golden sunrise over calm water

agents.ego_description: static camera contemplating the sunrise reflection on the water surface

entered.detail: tranquil water surface with gentle ripples reflecting the warm sunrise
bright golden reflection of the low sun creating a path on the water
silhouetted buildings and structures on the horizon against the bright sky
tall industrial crane or tower structure visible on the right horizon

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a wide-open waterfront at dawn. The camera remains static, capturing the golden sunrise reflecting on the calm water surface. A distant city skyline appears as dark silhouettes against the brightening sky, with an industrial tower visible on the right horizon, creating a serene and contemplative atmosphere.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous transition from a moody, rain-slicked cyberpunk cityscape at night to a serene waterfront at dawn. It begins on an elevated walkway where a character stands by a glass railing overlooking a neon-lit skyline, before turning to walk directly toward and past the camera. As the character passes, the atmospheric haze and cyan and orange reflections of the wet pavement dissolve, shifting the environment from an urban enclosure to a wide-open coastal vista. The scene then opens onto a calm water surface that mirrors the golden light of a rising sun, while the dense skyscrapers are replaced by dark silhouettes of a distant city and an industrial tower on the horizon.
